name_en: ❄️Chanel's stunning model ⚜️ CHANEL 2023/24 New Arrival! AS4416. 【Stunning Parisian elegance! Chanel's 2023/24 Fall/Winter collection shines in this all-black handbag! 💓 Hi, dear friends!
